lines.label: assumption
lines.text: A review Go team handles case 4449 during an isolated binary, deployment, and restore defense. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove durable-state boundaries, versioned formats, atomic replacement, in-flight recovery, and offline audit; release evidence binds source, modules, build settings, binary or image, configuration, policy, and restored state; then inject one session, secret, SSRF, output, path, log, privacy, or retention fault and contain every derivative. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original URL, robots, sitemap, HTTP, HTML, frontier, accessibility, browser-service, and report fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, x/net/html, goquery, Colly, files, processes, race, load, assistive-technology review, containers, legal review, restore, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates. Competency probe: Load and reconcile checkpoints without network effects, require current authorization, then prove no lost or duplicated state before restart.

lines.label: risk
lines.text: Successful decoding is sufficient resume validation.

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Load and reconcile checkpoints without network effects, require current authorization, then prove no lost or duplicated state before restart. Artifact under review: crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint.

options.text: The Offline Resume Audit record says crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint looks right but supplies no governing condition, observation, changed case, or counterexample. That claim fails the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary for Offline Resume Audit.

For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner permission, revision, URL and robots policy, body and parser limits, record and graph provenance, frontier and goroutine ownership, Colly differences, changed fixtures, privacy, accessibility, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as Go crawler proof. This does not satisfy Offline Resume Audit for crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint.
The record names the assumption, applies Offline Resume Audit, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.

steps.why: Retrieving Offline Resume Audit through the concrete crash-consistent policy-bound checkpoint case exposes causal gaps that recognition alone can hide. For Authorized site auditing and Go Record what required effort · Review Offline Resume Audit, keep Offline Resume Audit connected to executable Go authorization, URL, robots, response, tree, frontier, goroutine, report, deployment, and recovery decision evidence.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Load and reconcile checkpoints without network effects, require current authorization, then prove no lost or duplicated state before restart.
